overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk from a covered concrete underpass into a sunlit desert-city environment. The player crosses a palm-lined street, passes construction sites with industrial scaffolding, and approaches futuristic skyscrapers in a dense urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete pedestrian underpass with linear lighting

events.description: exits covered underpass into bright outdoor urban environment

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with fluorescent lighting, approaching the bright exit

entered.detail: rough textured concrete ceiling with mounted linear fluorescent tube lights
long white fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
sloped concrete walkway leading upward toward the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit concrete underpass with fluorescent tube lighting. The camera moves steadily forward along a sloped ramp toward a bright exit, transitioning from the enclosed artificial space to the outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit urban plaza with palm trees and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: emerges from shadow into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare
crosses the street at marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at a marked crosswalk, moving with a group of pedestrians through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: large red six-wheeled truck waiting at the intersection
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza area with brown trunks and green fronds
large red industrial structure with cylindrical storage tanks
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on orange-tinted pavement
rocky desert mountains with dark smoke rising in the distance
tall pole with traffic signal and pedestrian crossing button

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into bright midday sun, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza lined with palm trees. The camera crosses a marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the intersection. A large red industrial building stands to the right, with desert mountains visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with construction barriers

events.description: turns left to observe a damaged vehicle parked by construction fencing
resumes forward walking direction along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk observing the construction site on the left and passing traffic on the right, briefly turning to inspect a parked car

notable_agents.action: damaged silver sedan parked beside construction scaffolding

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure with orange and white construction barriers
tall blue glass tower with complex geometric external structure
tall street light poles with horizontal solar panel arrays
yellow construction cranes visible behind the scaffolding

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a busy road, the camera passes construction scaffolding and barriers on the left. The view opens toward a distinctive futuristic skyscraper in the distance. The camera briefly turns to observe a damaged silver sedan parked by the construction fence before continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: extended construction zone with industrial equipment and elevated highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past extensive construction barriers and industrial equipment, with occasional vehicles passing on the right

entered.detail: tall dark gray building with vertical DAKOTA signage and geometric facade
concrete elevated roadway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along an extended construction zone bordered by metal fencing and orange barriers. A massive dark building with vertical signage towers on the left, while an elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right. The futuristic skyscraper grows larger in the center of the frame as the camera approaches the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering modern architecture

events.description: tilts camera upward to view the facade of the tall glass building
returns camera to forward facing position at street level

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and architectural details, then returning gaze to street level

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass windows and geometric architectural patterns

segments.scene_description: Approaching the dense city center, the camera tilts upward to admire a towering glass facade building with reflective windows and geometric patterns. Power lines crisscross the blue sky overhead. After observing the architectural details, the camera returns to street level to continue the walk through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed underpass into a sprawling, sun-drenched futuristic city. It begins by moving steadily along a sloped concrete ramp under fluorescent lights, transitioning from the artificial gloom toward a bright outdoor exit. As the camera emerges into the midday sun, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza with palm trees and a red industrial building, while hazy desert mountains frame the distant horizon. The view then shifts along a busy sidewalk past construction scaffolding and a damaged silver sedan, moving through a zone of metal fencing and orange barriers as a massive dark building and an elevated highway flank the path. Finally, the camera approaches the dense city center, tilting upward to observe the reflective glass facade of a towering skyscraper and crisscrossing power lines against a blue sky before returning to street level.
